info.title: mk-clock-adult API
info.description: Local HTTP API for mk-clock-adult 1.2.62. Includes independently selectable INSIDE temperature fonts, aligned INSIDE humidity, fixed-time and today low / high Weather panel selection, visible-pixel OLED clock centring, alarm-state OLED labelling, ordered multi-warning rotation, backup and restore, and expanded diagnostics.

get.description: Returns live display, audio, bedtime, touch, font, AHT10 inside sensor, ordered active Weather warnings, alarm state, next-alarm details, and the last successful alarm audio start.
Returns release, platform, identity, network, time, storage, SD-card, service, OLED, touch, AHT10 inside sensor, Weather service, and alarm health.

selected.description: Uploaded filename, stable system-font key, or empty for a built-in OLED font or automatic detection.

get.description: Returns built-in OLED fonts, installed Linux fonts, uploaded fonts, and the active selection.

get.summary: Read an uploaded or Linux system font
get.description: Supply either file for an uploaded font or key for a stable system-font key returned by the font list.

post.summary: Upload one or more MP3 files for sequential asynchronous optimization

202.description: Files accepted as one processing batch

400.description: No valid MP3 files or unsupported settings

409.description: A batch is already queued or processing, or the job queue lacks capacity
The same filename is still processing

503.description: Deleted, but the clock core could not be notified

post.summary: Upload a TTF or OTF font

oled_font_file.description: Uploaded font filename, stable system-font key, or an empty string to use the selected built-in OLED font or automatic detection.

inside_font_file.description: Uploaded font filename, stable system-font key, or an empty string to use the clock font for the large INSIDE temperature.

weather_warning_chime_enabled.description: Use 1 to play the protected built-in message chime when a new non-empty Weather warning type appears.

weather_warning_chime_during_bedtime.description: Use 1 to allow Weather warning chimes during the configured bedtime window; use 0 to silence them during bedtime.

post.description: Pushes the ECCC location, ordered active warning descriptions, resolved current conditions, and three independently configured panel slots to the C core. Warning descriptions remain in source-array order. Each slot explicitly states whether its temperature is available, so missing data is never represented as 0°C.

location.description: Weather location name displayed above the clock in the OLED Weather dashboard.

current_temperature_c.description: Resolved current outside temperature. Uses the ECCC observation when available, otherwise the nearest hourly forecast.

current_temperature_available.description: 1 when a current outside temperature is available from either an observation or the nearest hourly forecast.

current_temperature_is_forecast.description: 1 when current_temperature_c was obtained from the nearest hourly forecast because currentConditions did not contain a temperature.

humidity_available.description: 1 when relative humidity was present in ECCC currentConditions. Hourly forecast data is not used to invent humidity.

slot0_kind.description: Panel source kind. TODAY carries daily low, high, occurrence hours, and maximum precipitation probability.

slot0_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot0_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot0_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for INSIDE rendering.

slot0_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for INSIDE rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot0_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. INSIDE renders the local AHT10 temperature and humidity.

slot1_kind.description: Panel source kind. TODAY carries daily low, high, occurrence hours, and maximum precipitation probability.

slot1_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot1_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot1_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for INSIDE rendering.

slot1_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for INSIDE rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot1_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. INSIDE renders the local AHT10 temperature and humidity.

slot2_kind.description: Panel source kind. TODAY carries daily low, high, occurrence hours, and maximum precipitation probability.

slot2_date_label.description: Optional uppercase date displayed when the selected forecast falls on a later local date.

slot2_temperature_available.description: 1 when slotN_temperature_c is valid. A missing temperature is displayed as --° rather than 0°C.

slot2_temperature_c.description: Panel temperature when slotN_temperature_available is 1. Ignored for INSIDE rendering.

slot2_precipitation_probability_percent.description: Hourly probability of precipitation. Ignored for INSIDE rendering; zero hides the percentage on the OLED.

slot2_icon.description: Weather icon for OUTSIDE or forecast. INSIDE renders the local AHT10 temperature and humidity.

warning_type.description: Compatibility field containing the first active Environment Canada warning description. Empty when no warning is active.

warning_count.description: Number of ordered warningN_description fields supplied.

warning0_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 0. Empty when unused.

warning1_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 1. Empty when unused.

warning2_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 2. Empty when unused.

warning3_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 3. Empty when unused.

warning4_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 4. Empty when unused.

warning5_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 5. Empty when unused.

warning6_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 6. Empty when unused.

warning7_description.description: Active Environment Canada warning description at source-array position 7. Empty when unused.

slot0_low_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY low temperature and hour are valid.

slot0_low_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY low occurs.

slot0_high_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY high temperature and hour are valid.

slot0_high_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY high occurs.

slot1_low_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY low temperature and hour are valid.

slot1_low_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY low occurs.

slot1_high_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY high temperature and hour are valid.

slot1_high_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY high occurs.

slot2_low_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY low temperature and hour are valid.

slot2_low_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY low occurs.

slot2_high_temperature_available.description: 1 when the TODAY high temperature and hour are valid.

slot2_high_hour.description: Local hour when the TODAY high occurs.

get.summary: Read the ECCC GeoMet city-item URL

500.description: Weather source could not be read

post.summary: Save the ECCC GeoMet city-item URL

get.summary: Read the latest weather refresh result and activity history

500.description: Weather activity could not be read

get.description: Returns independent source selections for all three OLED weather panels.

mode.description: room = local INSIDE AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback; today = current local day low and high with their forecast hours and the day’s maximum precipitation probability; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead; time = next occurrence of a selected local forecast hour

time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

mode.description: room = local INSIDE AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback; today = current local day low and high with their forecast hours and the day’s maximum precipitation probability; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead; time = next occurrence of a selected local forecast hour

time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

mode.description: room = local INSIDE AHT10 temperature and humidity; outside = current ECCC conditions with nearest-hour fallback; today = current local day low and high with their forecast hours and the day’s maximum precipitation probability; offset = hourly forecast a fixed number of hours ahead; time = next occurrence of a selected local forecast hour

time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

post.description: Each panel may independently show INSIDE, current OUTSIDE conditions, an hourly forecast from 1 to 48 hours ahead, or the next occurrence of a specific forecast hour. Selections may repeat.

slot1_mode.description: Panel source: room, outside, today low / high, relative hourly offset, or specific local hour.

slot2_mode.description: Panel source: room, outside, today low / high, relative hourly offset, or specific local hour.

slot3_mode.description: Panel source: room, outside, today low / high, relative hourly offset, or specific local hour.

slot1_time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

slot2_time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

slot3_time.description: Specific local forecast hour used when mode is time

200.description: Panel settings saved and weather refresh requested
ZIP containing settings, alarms, uploaded fonts, and Weather configuration

409.description: Alarm active or another maintenance operation is running

500.description: Restore failed and previous state was restored
